title: Figura Mod Over Changed
description: Mainly made for a friend, two mixins that disable changed's model rendering when a figura avatar is equipped
body:
Likely won't update this mod. Maybe I will. 

This is just something I threw together mostly for a friend, if there is a figura avatar on, all changed mod's model changes get canceled, this does have the side effect of models that show vanilla avatar showing the normal player instead of the changed model, so be warned. 

idk if this has any issues so good luck lmao.
